label: Badge
summary: Inline flashing tags, NEW!, UPDATED!, HOT!, COOL!, for links you touched this month.
era: The flashing NEW! gif planted beside every link the webmaster touched this month.

classes.name: rs-badge--new
classes.role: modifier: NEW! in red on yellow

a11y: The badge is real text, read inline where it sits; add rs-blink for the flash and reduced motion renders it static bold.
